compiled_state.author: Iso Tester

comments.author: Iso Tester
comments.body: PR #49 opened (https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/pull/49) and auto-merge (squash) enabled. Implements: consolidated plan-review gate into gates.plan_review_precheck (shared by claim_compute + transition_compute); gates EVERY entry into in_progress (open/blocked/closed -> in_progress) so no side-door bypasses the gate; #47 parent-first cascade preserved with --force propagation; MCP transition_ticket exposes no force (parity with claim_ticket). Rebased onto origin/main (past #47 + #48). 605 related tests pass; ruff clean. Reviewed across 5 adversarial subagent rounds (each found+fixed a real issue: NDJSON import regression, MCP bypass asymmetry, open->blocked->in_progress side-door, closed->in_progress side-door). Awaiting CI; will close on merge.

compiled_state.description:
## What

`transition <id> open in_progress` currently bypasses the plan-review claim gate that `claim` enforces. Starting work via a plain transition should apply the SAME validation (require a certified plan-review attestation, or `--force` with an audit note). The gate logic, today living in `src/rebar/_commands/claim.py::_plan_review_precheck`, must be consolidated into a single shared method that both the claim path and the transition path call — so the two cannot drift.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The plan-review gate validation lives in ONE method (consolidated out of `claim.py` into a shared home, e.g. `src/rebar/_commands/gates.py`).
- [ ] `claim_compute` calls the consolidated method (behavior unchanged; existing claim-gate tests still pass).
- [ ] `transition_compute` calls the consolidated method when transitioning `open -> in_progress`, blocking (fail-closed) on a missing/stale attestation when the gate is enabled, and exempting bug/session_log.
- [ ] `--force` (with audit comment) bypasses the gate on the transition path, mirroring claim.
- [ ] New tests cover the transition open->in_progress gate (blocked / force-bypass / bug-exempt / earned-attestation-succeeds).
compiled_state.title: Apply plan-review gate to open->in_progress transition; consolidate claim/transition gate logic
